rules: User-facing reports, manuals, PDFs, and printed outputs should include a glossary appendix when technical terms appear in the body.
Each glossary item should explain the exact meaning first and then restate it in plain Korean.
Each glossary item should say why the term matters in the specific task or system, not just define it abstractly.
If a term affects cost, recovery, security, automation behavior, backup, or approval flow, keep it in the appendix even if it appears only once.
If the report contains no technical terms, the glossary appendix may be omitted.
